items.title: Modules & Imports
items.description: Reusable modules are the natural endpoint of understanding Python's import system.

items.title: src layout
items.description: The src layout puts your reusable package at `src/<pkg>/`, isolating it from project metadata.

items.title: pyproject Packaging
items.description: Once modules are reusable, `pyproject.toml` makes them installable and distributable.

items.title: CLI Tools
items.description: Reusable modules become CLI commands via `if __name__ == '__main__'` or console-script entry points.

items.title: Fixtures & Mocks
items.description: Modules built with dependency injection mock cleanly without `patch` gymnastics.
